title: Air-Fried Yellow Onion Delight
description: A light and juicy Slovakian dish featuring fermented yellow onions, perfect for a low-carb snack or meal.
instructions: Slice the yellow onions thinly and sprinkle with salt.
Heat 2 tablespoons of cooking oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Add the sliced onions and cook until they are soft and slightly caramelized, about 5-7 minutes.
Transfer the cooked onions to a serving dish and lightly drizzle with 1/2 teaspoon of salt while warm for extra flavor.
Air fry at 360°F (180°C) for 20-25 minutes until crispy. Toss occasionally during frying.
